articles.author: Tariq Malik
articles.title: There's a bit of toilet trouble on NASA's Artemis 2 mission to the moon - space.com
articles.description: It wasn't their No. 1 problem, but it was a problem for going number one.

articles.author: Alex Fitzpatrick
articles.title: Artemis II successfully launches for historic Moon mission - Axios
articles.description: The launch will carry humans as far as they've journeyed since the Apollo days.
articles.content:
• It's also a key step towards NASA's grand ambition to return human boots to lunar soil, and the Trump administration's dreams of a permanent Moon base.
